name: Benthos: Aequor
descriptionTemplate: When certain Awakeners are in the team, the {Aequor} Realm ascends to {Benthos: Aequor}. {Tentacle DMG} is changed to 5% of the team's Max HP. Team DMG Amplification +50% after exploration begins; this effect is doubled if the team is entirely {Aequor} and {Chaos} Awakeners, though no additional starting Tentacles are obtained. Tentacle Gathering is removed, {Benthos: Tentacle Stance} replaces the standard Tentacle Stance, and Realm Mastery is counted as {Benthos: Aequor Mastery}.
